description: Automatic LLM-as-judge classification (paper Section Automatic Evaluation).

messages.content: Single JSON object (serialized as a string for the chat message body) with keys: question (full exercise README text), sql (erroneous variant SQL file contents).

index.path_resolution: Every path string in the index is relative to the directory that contains index.jsonl (the automatic/ folder), so data/... resolves to automatic/data/...

notes: Gold labels in the benchmark index use the same four strings as structured_output_labels (logical, not conceptual).
Harness reference: UTAL sqlagent/evals.py function evaluate_classification(); single sample per item (no repeated sampling).
When porting the harness, open index.jsonl with cwd set to automatic/ or join paths against the automatic/ directory.
